title: Soul Eater sends the controlled Limited Summon to cemetery

card.rawText: You may use a Limited Summon on the field as a sacrifice for summoning. Send the Limited Summon to the cemetery of the player that currently controls it.

effect.value: You may use a Limited Summon on the field as a sacrifice for summoning. Send the Limited Summon to the cemetery of the player that currently controls it.

plan.title: Soul Eater sends the controlled Limited Summon to cemetery
plan.summary: Play Soul Eater with a Limited Summon on field and verify the Limited Summon sacrifice/cemetery routing.

notes: Read text first: a Limited Summon on the field can be used as sacrifice and is sent to the cemetery of its current controller.

steps: Resolve the Limited Summon target prompt.

expectedAssertions.label: Limited Summon was sent to cemetery

manualVerification: Confirm ownership/controller cemetery routing in live play when the Limited Summon changed control.
riskNotes: The headless fixture proves the current-controller sacrifice route.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Play Soul Eater with a Limited Summon on field and verify the Limited Summon sacrifice/cemetery routing.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
